bid_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share

Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer

Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share, including $19.00 of cash to be paid at closing and the remaining per share price to be paid in the form of options to be issued to Mac-Gray stockholders
CSC/Pamplona were willing to increase their all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share as a last and best offer

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona submitted a $20.75 per share all-cash proposal and requested exclusive negotiations.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share, reiterating that Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction and requesting that CSC/Pamplona and Mac-Gray agree to engage in exclusive negotiations for two weeks.

event_claims.description: Party A reiterated that its prior $18.00 to $19.00 per share all-cash indication was its best and final offer.
event_claims.quote_text: Also on September 18, 2013, Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer.

event_claims.description: Party B submitted a revised indication of interest valued at $21.50 per share, including cash and options.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share, including $19.00 of cash to be paid at closing and the remaining per share price to be paid in the form of options to be issued to Mac-Gray stockholders

event_claims.description: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication.
event_claims.quote_text: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest of an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share nor did it specify any reasons in connection therewith.

event_claims.description: The Special Committee authorized the Transaction Committee to tell CSC/Pamplona it would be prepared to move into exclusivity at $21.25 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: The Special Committee then authorized the Transaction Committee to inform CSC/Pamplona that the Special Committee would be prepared to move into exclusivity at a price of $21.25 per share

event_claims.description: Mac-Gray proposed moving forward with CSC/Pamplona on an exclusive basis for two weeks if CSC/Pamplona increased its all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 21, 2013, the members of the Transaction Committee called the representative of CSC/Pamplona to propose that Mac-Gray was prepared to move forward with CSC/Pamplona on an exclusive basis for two weeks subject to CSC/Pamplona increasing their all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share.

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona confirmed a last and best offer of $21.25 per share, conditioned on a two-week exclusivity period.
event_claims.quote_text: Later that same day, the representative of CSC/Pamplona called the members of the Transaction Committee to confirm that CSC/Pamplona were willing to increase their all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share as a last and best offer, provided that Mac-Gray agree to a two week period of exclusive negotiations.

event_claims.description: The Special Committee authorized Mac-Gray to enter into an exclusivity agreement through 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: After discussion, the Special Committee authorized Mac-Gray to enter into an exclusivity agreement providing for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013 on the terms included in the CSC/Pamplona final proposal

event_claims.description: CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 24, 2013, CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement providing for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013
